form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after seven months second last of 10 at this track on March 22 over 1400m, 7 len behind Anyang Gippeum carrying 52.5kg at $36.60. Previously second-up 8th of 11 at this track on June 8 over 1200m, 17 len behind Gwanaksan O Two with 52kg at $13. Needs to do a lot more.

form.formComment: Returns from a 34-day let-up. Most recently did the work up front then tired 5th of 11 at this track on March 8 over 1400m, slow going 1.5 len behind Stay Big carrying 55.5kg at $2.70. The race before that favourite; raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by 0.5 len at this track February 1 over 1200m defeating Duson Eutteum carrying 53kg at $4. Not far from winner at his last appearance and rates highly.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Comes here off a 35-day let-up. At the latest run won by 4 len at this track March 7 over 1200m defeating Crazy Mango carrying 53kg at $5.50. Before that sat on the pace when 2nd of 11 at this track on February 1 over 1300m, 5 len behind Superday carrying 56.5kg at $1.70. Can go on with it.
